test.query: SELECT number AS n FROM numbers_mt(1900000000) ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 9 FORMAT Null
SELECT number AS n FROM numbers_mt(400000000) ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT number AS n FROM numbers_mt(931677018) ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null
SELECT number AS n FROM numbers_mt(670000000) ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 5000 FORMAT Null
SELECT number AS n FROM numbers_mt(540000000) ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 8100 FORMAT Null
SELECT number AS n FROM numbers_mt(510000000) ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 12600 FORMAT Null
SELECT number AS n FROM numbers_mt(350000000) ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10000 FORMAT Null
SELECT number AS n FROM numbers_mt(200000000) ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 65535 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(820000000) ORDER BY n LIMIT 2 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(830000000) ORDER BY n LIMIT 22 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(200000000) ORDER BY n LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(200000000) ORDER BY n LIMIT 1500 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(200000000) ORDER BY n LIMIT 3000 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(410000000) ORDER BY n LIMIT 10200 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(340000000) ORDER BY n LIMIT 17200 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(120000000) ORDER BY n LIMIT 65535 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(470000000) ORDER BY n, n + 1, n + 2 LIMIT 2 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(450000000) ORDER BY n, n + 1, n + 2 LIMIT 22 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(200000000) ORDER BY n, n + 1, n + 2 LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(200000000) ORDER BY n, n + 1, n + 2 LIMIT 1500 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(200000000) ORDER BY n, n + 1, n + 2 LIMIT 3000 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(250000000) ORDER BY n, n + 1, n + 2 LIMIT 10300 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(200000000) ORDER BY n, n + 1, n + 2 LIMIT 16300 FORMAT Null
SELECT intHash64(number) AS n FROM numbers_mt(60000000) ORDER BY n, n + 1, n + 2 LIMIT 65535 FORMAT Null
